messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a digital marketing brand audit presentation for our clients. The file should be saved as 'Brand_Audit_2023.pptx', all content must be in French, and the slides should be 16:9 Widescreen landscape. Apply a vibrant creative style with gradient backgrounds and bold sans-serif fonts. You are strictly forbidden from using external APIs or web scraping; provide all mock data directly in your code. Ensure that any chart creation uses XL_CHART_TYPE instead of ChartType. It is also mandatory to check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing its .text property.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Brand_Audit_2023.pptx"

# Vibrant creative palette
COLOR_PRIMARY = RGBColor(0xE8, 0x43, 0x93)   # magenta
COLOR_SECONDARY = RGBColor(0x6C, 0x5C, 0xE7)  # purple
COLOR_ACCENT = RGBColor(0x00, 0xB8, 0x94)     # teal
COLOR_DARK = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x34, 0x36)       # near-black
COLOR_LIGHT = RGBColor(0xFD, 0xFE, 0xFE)      # off-white
COLOR_CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_GRADIENT_1 = RGBColor(0xFD, 0x79, 0xA8)
COLOR_GRADIENT_2 = RGBColor(0xA2, 0x9B, 0xFE)

FONT_HEADING = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(prs, slide):
    """Fill the entire slide with a solid background color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=None):
    """Add a text box with optional styling."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    if alignment is not None:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    """Add a rounded-rectangle card with title and body text."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color or COLOR_CARD_BG
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.2)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.2)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.15)

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p_title.text = title
    run_t = p_title.runs[0] if p_title.runs else p_title.add_run()
    run_t.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    run_t.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK

    if body:
        p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
        p_body.text = body
        run_b = p_body.runs[0] if p_body.runs else p_body.add_run()
        run_b.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY
        run_b.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x63, 0x6E, 0x72)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, left, top, width, height, bg_color=None):
    """Add a small colored section label / tag."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color or COLOR_SECONDARY
    shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT
    run.text = label_text

    return shape


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=6):
    """Add a small centered footer with page number."""
    text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(
        slide,
        left=Inches(5.8), top=Inches(7.0), width=Inches(1.73), height=Inches(0.4),
        text=text, font_size=9, color=RGBColor(0xB2, 0xBE, 0xC6), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Insert an image if the file exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xF1, 0xF2, 0xF8)
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_SECONDARY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.name = FONT_BODY
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_SECONDARY
        run.text = "Image"


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    """Title slide — Audit de Marque."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    # Decorative gradient overlay (top-left to bottom-right diagonal feel via two shapes)
    deco1 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), Inches(5.0), Inches(7.5))
    deco1.fill.solid()
    deco1.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GRADIENT_1
    deco1.line.fill.background()

    deco2 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.5), Inches(0), Inches(8.83), Inches(7.5))
    deco2.fill.solid()
    deco2.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    deco2.line.fill.background()

    # Accent line
    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.06))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    # Title text (white)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.5),
                 "Audit de Marque", font_size=44, bold=True, color=COLOR_LIGHT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(3.6), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "Analyse Stratégique & Recommandations", font_size=20, bold=False, color=RGBColor(0xFF, 0xE8, 0xF5))

    # Date / client info
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.3), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.5),
                 "Préparé pour le Client | Janvier 2023", font_size=14, bold=False, color=RGBColor(0xFF, 0xD0, 0xE8))

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    """Slide 2 — Résumé Exécutif with KPI cards."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    # Title area (white overlay band at top)
    title_band = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.4))
    title_band.fill.solid()
    title_band.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT
    title_band.line.fill.background()

    # Title text (dark)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.25), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "Résumé Exécutif", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK)

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(9.0), Inches(0.5),
                 "Vue d'ensemble des performances de la marque sur les canaux digitaux", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(0x63, 0x6E, 0x72))

    # KPI Card 1 — Notoriété de Marque
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(2.4),
             "Notoriété de Marque", "+34% en 2023\nTaux d'atteinte: 78%", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG)

    # KPI Card 2 — Taux d'Engagement
    add_card(slide, Inches(4.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(2.4),
             "Taux d'Engagement", "+22% en 2023\nPortée: 1.2M utilisateurs", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG)

    # KPI Card 3 — Part de Marché
    add_card(slide, Inches(8.4), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(2.4),
             "Part de Marché", "+8% en 2023\nPosition: #3 du secteur", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG)

    # Summary paragraph
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.5), Inches(11.5), Inches(2.5),
                 "La marque a enregistré une croissance significative de sa visibilité en ligne au cours des douze derniers mois. Les efforts de contenu et les campagnes publicitaires ciblées ont permis d'augmenter l'engagement global de 22%. La part de marché sur le segment digital progresse régulièrement, positionnant la marque comme un acteur majeur dans son secteur.",
                 font_size=13, color=COLOR_DARK)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def slide_03_performance_metrics(prs):
    """Slide 3 — Indicateurs de Performance with bar chart."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    # Title band
    title_band = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.4))
    title_band.fill.solid()
    title_band.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT
    title_band.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.25), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "Indicateurs de Performance", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK)

    # Chart data
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['Réseaux Sociaux', 'SEO / Référencement', 'Email Marketing', 'Publicité Payante']
    chart_data.add_series('Ventes (en K€)', (120, 95, 78, 145))

    left_chart = Inches(0.6)
    top_chart = Inches(1.8)
    width_chart = Inches(6.5)
    height_chart = Inches(3.8)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left_chart, top_chart, width_chart, height_chart, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 120

    # Style the series bars
    for i, point in enumerate(plot.series[0].points):
        if i == 0:
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
        elif i == 1:
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_SECONDARY
        elif i == 2:
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_ACCENT
        else:
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GRADIENT_1

    # Category axis labels
    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.name = FONT_BODY

    val_axis = chart.value_axis
    val_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(9)
    val_axis.has_title = True
    val_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Ventes (K€)"
    val_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(10)

    # Right-side bullet points
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(5.3), Inches(4.0),
                 "Points Clés:\n\n• Les réseaux sociaux restent le canal de vente principal avec 120 K€\n• Le SEO continue de croître grâce aux optimisations récentes\n• L'email marketing affiche un ROI stable à 78 K€\n• La publicité payante a généré les revenus les plus élevés (145 K€)\n• Recommandation: augmenter le budget publicitaire de 15%",
                 font_size=13, color=COLOR_DARK)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_04_competitive_analysis(prs):
    """Slide 4 — Analyse Concurrentielle with competitor cards."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    # Title band
    title_band = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.4))
    title_band.fill.solid()
    title_band.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT
    title_band.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.25), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "Analyse Concurrentielle", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK)

    # Competitor A card
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8),
             "Concurrent A — Leader du Marché",
             "Forces:\n• Grande notoriété\n• Budget important\n• Réseau étendu\n\nFaiblesses:\n• Moins agile\n• Engagement faible", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=RGBColor(0xFD, 0x79, 0xA8))

    # Competitor B card
    add_card(slide, Inches(4.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8),
             "Concurrent B — Challenger",
             "Forces:\n• Innovation forte\n• Contenu créatif\n• Communauté active\n\nFaiblesses:\n• Visibilité limitée\n• Ressources réduites", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=RGBColor(0x6C, 0x5C, 0xE7))

    # Competitor C card
    add_card(slide, Inches(8.4), Inches(1.7), Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8),
             "Concurrent C — Nouveau Entrant",
             "Forces:\n• Approche disruptive\n• Prix compétitifs\n• Digital natif\n\nFaiblesses:\n• Marque inconnue\n• Peu d'expérience", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=RGBColor(0x00, 0xB8, 0x94))

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_05_recommendations(prs):
    """Slide 5 — Recommandations Stratégiques."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    # Title band
    title_band = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.4))
    title_band.fill.solid()
    title_band.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT
    title_band.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.25), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "Recommandations Stratégiques", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK)

    # Recommendation cards — 2x2 grid
    recs = [
        ("Augmenter le Budget Publicitaire", "Allouer +15% au PPC pour maximiser les conversions et étendre la portée sur les réseaux sociaux.", COLOR_PRIMARY),
        ("Renforcer la Stratégie SEO", "Investir dans le contenu long-form et optimiser l'architecture du site pour améliorer le classement organique.", COLOR_SECONDARY),
        ("Développer le Marketing d'Influence", "Collaborer avec 10 micro-influenceurs pour toucher de nouvelles audiences qualifiées.", COLOR_ACCENT),
        ("Améliorer l'Expérience Utilisateur", "Refondre le parcours client et optimiser les temps de chargement du site web.", RGBColor(0xFD, 0x79, 0xA8)),
    ]

    positions = [
        (Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.8), Inches(2.3)),
        (Inches(6.7), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.8), Inches(2.3)),
        (Inches(0.6), Inches(4.3), Inches(5.8), Inches(2.3)),
        (Inches(6.7), Inches(4.3), Inches(5.8), Inches(2.3)),
    ]

    for idx, ((title, body, _color), (l, t, w, h)) in enumerate(zip(recs, positions)):
        card = add_card(slide, l, t, w, h, title, body)
        # Add a colored accent bar at the top of each card
        accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, l, t, Inches(0.12), h)
        accent_bar.fill.solid()
        accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = _color
        accent_bar.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_06_next_steps(prs):
    """Slide 6 — Prochaines Étapes & Contact."""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide)

    # Title band
    title_band = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.4))
    title_band.fill.solid()
    title_band.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT
    title_band.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.25), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "Prochaines Étapes", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK)

    # Timeline bullets on the left
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5),
                 "Phase 1 — Janvier 2023\n• Finaliser l'audit complet\n• Valider les recommandations avec la direction\n\nPhase 2 — Février-Mars 2023\n• Lancer les campagnes publicitaires optimisées\n• Débuter le programme d'influence\n\nPhase 3 — Avril-Juin 2023\n• Mesurer l'impact des actions mises en place\n• Ajuster la stratégie selon les résultats",
                 font_size=14, color=COLOR_DARK)

    # Contact card on the right
    contact_card = add_card(slide, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.8), Inches(3.0),
                            "Contactez-nous",
                            "Agence Digitale\ncontact@agence-digitale.fr\n+33 1 23 45 67 89\nwww.agence-digitale.fr", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=COLOR_SECONDARY)

    # Accent bar on contact card
    accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(0.12), Inches(3.0))
    accent_bar.fill.solid()
    accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_SECONDARY
    accent_bar.line.fill.background()

    # Closing note at bottom
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.8), Inches(12.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "Merci de votre confiance. Nous restons à votre disposition pour toute question ou demande d'information complémentaire.",
                 font_size=13, color=RGBColor(0x63, 0x6E, 0x72))

    add_footer(slide, 6)


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_performance_metrics(prs)
    slide_04_competitive_analysis(prs)
    slide_05_recommendations(prs)
    slide_06_next_steps(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
